business_purpose: Per-item cost allocation of import landed costs — allocated overhead, landed unit cost.

Total landed cost including all charges (duty, freight, insurance)
Cost per unit after allocating all landed costs

business_purpose: Stores import landed cost details — customs duty, freight, insurance per import PO.

columns.business_meaning: Customs duty percentage applied to import
CESS surcharge percentage on customs duty
1 = Include GST in landed cost calculation, 0 = Exclude
Total landed cost including all charges (duty, freight, insurance)
Timestamp when record was last updated

columns.business_meaning: Date the Purchase Order was issued

Exchange rate at time of PO (Foreign currency to LCY)
